versions.version_description: This version has a more accurate timing with chord changes at beat "1" and "2 AND" as well as more accurate chords.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

content:
The Script - Breakeven
tabbed by: jamiewb

capo on 3rd fret

[Intro]

[ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] (x4) 
[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I'm still alive but I'm barely breathing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Just prayed to a god that I don't believe in [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Cos I got time while she got freedom[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Cos when a heart breaks no it don't break even[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Her best days will be some of my worst [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
  She finally met a man thats gonna put her first[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
While I'm wide awake she's no trouble sleeping[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Cos when a heart breaks no it don't breakeven[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
      What am I sposed to do when the best part of me was always you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
      What am I sposed to say when I'm all choked up and your ok[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]
    I'm falling to pieces[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch] 
    I'm falling to pieces [/tab]

[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
They say bad things happen for a reason [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
But nowise words gonna stop the bleeding[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Cos she's moved on while I'm still grieving [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Cos when a heart breaks no it don't breakeven[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
      What am I sposed to do when the best part of me was always you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
      What am I sposed to say when I'm all choked up and your ok[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]
    I'm falling to pieces[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch] 
    I'm falling to pieces [/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]
   I'm falling to pieces[/tab]
(One still in love while the other ones leaving)
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch] 
    I'm falling to pieces [/tab]
(Cos when a heart breaks no it don't breakeven)

[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] (x2)


[Verse]

[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
You got his heart and my heart and none of the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
You took your suitcase, I took the blame. [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch] m7                       [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Now I'm tryna make sense of what little remains, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] add9 >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>
Cos you left me with no love, no love to my name.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
I'm still alive but I'm barely breathing[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Just prayed to a god that I don't believe in [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Cos I got time while she got freedom[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]                  
Cos when a heart breaks no it don't break[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
No, it don't break[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
No, it don't break even, no! [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
      What am I sposed to do when the best part of me was always you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
      What am I sposed to say when I'm all choked up and your ok[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]    
     I'm falling to pieces [/tab]

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]    
     I'm falling to pieces  [/tab]
(Oh, I'm falling, I'm falling)

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]    
     I'm falling to pieces [/tab]
(One still in love while the other one's leaving)

[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]    
     I'm falling to pieces [/tab]
(Cos when a heart breaks no it don't breakeven)


[ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  (x2)


[Outro]

[tab]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no, oh[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no, oh[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
Oh, it don't break even, no, oh[/tab]


[ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  (repeat to fade).
